arts.ttl: Barcelona to miss out on €5m transfer windfall in January
arts.sum: Barcelona have been unable to sign any new players during the winter transfer window, but they have brought money in through sales. Unai Hernandez left the club to join Al-Ittihad in a deal worth €4.5m, and more money could be coming their way before the deadline on Monday night. arts.ttl: Barcelona still open to reaching pre-contract agreement with defender
arts.sum: Barcelona have been unable to sign anyone during the winter transfer window, but plans are already being drawn up for the summer. The club expects to be busy in the market, following their return to La Liga’s 1:1 rule earlier this month. arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Barcelona-Alaves: Two players recalled after Champions League rest
arts.sum: After Real Madrid’s defeat to Espanyol on Saturday, Barcelona can close the gap in the La Liga title race with victory against Alaves.
